extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob attacked after the summit of la Roche-aux-Faucons, exploited wait-and-see tactics of favorites, and soloed to 20+ second victory
tactical_patterns: Quickstep sent GILBERT Philippe early on la Roche-aux-Faucons to soften favorites before JUNGELS attacked post-summit
JUNGELS Bob exploited hesitation among favorites after summit la Roche-aux-Faucons, gaining 20 seconds that expanded into winning margin
NIBALI Vincenzo unable to follow GILBERT Philippe's initial acceleration on la Roche-aux-Faucons, eliminating pre-race favorite early
ALAPHILIPPE Julian protected team leader role while GILBERT and JUNGELS attacked, Quickstep placing two in top four

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: converted team support into first major win, attacked decisively post-summit rather than on climb itself
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: sacrificed personal ambitions with early la Roche-aux-Faucons attack that isolated rivals for JUNGELS
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: cracked immediately on GILBERT's initial acceleration la Roche-aux-Faucons, unable to follow favorites
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: attacked final 2km to secure second place, best result suggests improved climbing in Ardennes finale
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: attacked final 2km for third, consecutive podium indicates consistent threat in Ardennes-style finishes
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: fourth place while working for team, strength evident but tactical role limited personal result
